---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "\U0001F4DD Additional Information  Add any other information, examples, or
  references here."
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

📌 Feature Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you would like to suggest.

🎯 Purpose

Explain why this feature would be useful for the repository.

Example:

Improve learning experience
Add new practice questions
Enhance code readability
Improve performance
💡 Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like the feature to work.

📂 Related Area

Select the related topic or file:

🔢 Arrays
🔤 Strings
🔁 Loops
🧩 Functions
🔍 Prime Numbers
🏗️ Object-Oriented Programming
📂 File Handling
📄 Documentation
⚡ Optimization
🚀 Benefits

Describe the benefits of adding this feature.
